name: Oriental Grilled Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 1 large Yellow squash, cut into 1/2 inch slices
1 Red bell pepper, cut into 8 pieces
1 Green bell pepper, cut into 8 pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the coriander seeds using the back of a spoon and add them to a medium bowl.
2. Add the soy sauce, sherry, honey, ginger, oil, and garlic to the bowl with the crushed coriander seeds.
3. Add the vegetables (yellow squash, onion, red bell pepper, and green bell pepper) to the bowl and toss everything until the vegetables are evenly coated with the marinade.
4. Let the mixture stand for 15 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
5. Preheat the grill or broiler.
6. Thread the marinated vegetable pieces onto four, 6-inch skewers.
7. Cook the skewers 4 inches from the heat source, turning once, for 3 minutes per side, brushing with the remaining marinade during cooking.
From "Natural Health" magazine -- May/June 1993
A.MORELLI [Anne] at 08:23 EDT
